TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ == katukuh i Awcuo siluma' ŚąįťĀĒśĺ≥śī≤šł¶ŚģöŚĪÖ nikulitan nipaadih ni Cenmuse. Kuke pacunaay tu balunga' a tademaw tu mikacaway tu balunga' a tademaw atu ci Kewia-gae niyadu'ay a tademaw itini i Sinna-wie-s a Kenay-e dadipasan " sayaway malalitemuh" hatidaay tu nu seice sakamusa tademaw itini i sip-sep-sep-sep-sep a mang katukuh tu lim-sep-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan tu nu ayawan makatukuh tu i Awcuo, batad nu mihcaan hakiya katukuh tu cay-tu-lim-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan. sipakayni i udip nipikinkiwan misausi hakiya makaala tu sip-sip-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mang nu mihcaan. 44,000ŚĻīŚČć. itini i Awcuo kaadihan nu satabalay ni pelaan nu aydaay a tademaw nu liwan a kidu u " Mangke-zen", nisausian tuni kaudipan han mabatad tu ayda nu siptu-sep-sep-sep mang nu mihcaan. 42,000ŚĻīŚČć. sayaway singangan tu " Mangke-hu lu banggu" liwan nu ukak atu sumamad atu aydaay nu Tucu kinkiwen tu DNA palecad sakamusa Mangke-zen atu Awcuo-tucu ini' ku kanki nu silet nuheni, itini i Kesea-ce caay palutatenga. 35 DNAÁÜĪŚäõÁ†īŚ£ěÁöĄŚĹĪťüŅ. idaw ku miciliay sakamusa nai' ku misacacaya amikinkiwan tu tatengaay, nuni kasilahecian hakiya tunika patayan anika sumadan tu DNA nikalalit nu nika lawpesan. DNA . amica, kunikacilawan kuni kasilahecian, sakamusa ku Mangke-zen, nu i tawyaay a tademaw nu ayawan satabalay tahekal nu taas, aydaay nu muenengay a tademaw u ilu nu Mangke-zen. nina mikuwanay tu tuu'd nu Mangke a yuncumin, misausi acaay tu piedis tu katuuday nunipikinkiwan, sisa ayawhatu, acaay tu pisateked mikinkiw tu Ciin nuheni sa. ťõĖÁĄ∂, . hini saan, Awcuo tucu u kinacacay sa amabulaw, makatukuh tu Awcuo i enalay nu masaniyadu'ay a ilucan, nina kapulungan a iluc talaayawen ku sausi namaka nemsip-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan katukuh tu piclim-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan, sayaway nipiliyasan tu Huicuo nu aydaay a tademaw nu kenihan, nika idaw ku sibalucuay saan tu pina nu mabulaway a tademaw. nikaydaan a nikabulawan a dadan han, nika kelahan nu bayu u balunga ku kacawen nuheni "milebut tu subal", idaw ku naemekan, nina tucu itini nu tanayuay a dimadan, atu malawpesaytu nu Awcuo tabakiay a aadupan namapulung ku nuheni maudip. . namaka ciin, Awcuo yuncumin u Melani-siya atu Papu-yazen a lalum'aan, nika idaw ku cacaya a ciinna, hakiya namakayni i Nayu-zen anikalalamelan, hakiya nu aydaay nu Ocu-zen anikalalidan. . ni kinkiwan tu i kakitidaan tu imian Awcuo-zen nu katuuday a tapang nu masacacaya ku taas a binacadan. iluc nu kitidaan anika kenihan, saadidi' satu namaka Yacu enalan nu mabulaway anikalalidan. . duma satu Sinci-nieya a Papu-ya-zen, i nuayawan tu lutu-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan, namaka Huili-pin a Mama-nuya-zen " Mamanwa" nika liyasan a tahekal, itini tu i nuayawan tu lim-sep-sep-sep malebut a mihcaan buwah satu ku tademaw. (Mamanwa) . nipikinkiwan tu ciin itini i tusep-caycay a mihcaan, Awcu tucu, Papu-ya-zen atu Mama-nuya-zen idaw ku laday tu Yacuo sumamaday a tademaw tu Danni-suowa-zen a ciinan, sisa aydaay nu Yacuo a tademaw atu sumamaday a tademaw, itini i sipsip-sep-sep-sep nu ayawan a mihcaan malamel tu. śďö2011 . tina tusep-caytu a mihcaan napatahekal tu nisulidan, idaw ku nakamuan nipatahekal tu sip-sep-sep-sep a mihcaan, simakaydaay i Intu katukuh i Awcuo tabakiay nu ciin muculil. tawya a zitayan, unikilukan nu Awcuo tu sumamaday, kasumadan nu gigicu aru kakanen a zitayan, sisa micuduh tina tusaay nu laadan a kanki. ŤÄĆ2012 . Tucu u adupu ku kawaw nu sakaudip nuheni, amica kunikaw Tucu a siakayan, sawni mabulaw atu mibutin miadup ku wayway nuheni, tu caaya kalecad nu demiadan caay kalecad ku kakanen, nika kacaaya nu niyadu'an anika udipan atu lalangawan nuheni caay tu pilecad, itia i niyadu'an, idaw ku matenesay nu muenengay i tida atu malukay a kawaw. Awcuo enalan, sadecdecay nu tademaw hani itida i wali timulan a kitidaan, micidek ku Mei-li-he-ku. .
S.PHON: == r~…ĺikisi ** == katukuńß i aw ¶uo sir~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ******* nikur~…ĺitan nipaadińß ni ¶…ônmus…ô. kuk…ô pa ¶unaaj tu bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw tu mika ¶awaj tu bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° a tad…ômaw atu ¶i k…ôwia-ga…ô nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw itini i sinna-wi…ô-s a k…ônaj-…ô dadipasan " sajawaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß" ńßatidaaj tu nu s…ôi ¶…ô sakamusa tad…ômaw itini i sip-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a maŇč katukuńß tu r~…ĺim-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a maŇč nu mińß ¶aan tu nu ajawan makatukuńß tu i aw ¶uo, batad nu mińß ¶aan ńßakija katukuńß tu ¶aj-tu-r~…ĺim-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a maŇč nu mińß ¶aan. sipakajni i udip nipikinkiwan misausi ńßakija makaar~…ĺa tu sip-sip-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a maŇč nu maŇč nu mińß ¶aan. **,*****. itini i aw ¶uo kaadińßan nu satabar~…ĺaj ni p…ôr~…ĺaan nu ajdaaj a tad…ômaw nu r~…ĺiwan a kidu u " maŇčk…ô-z…ôn", nisausian tuni kaudipan ńßan mabatad tu ajda nu siptu-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp maŇč nu mińß ¶aan. **,*****. sajawaj siŇčaŇčan tu " maŇčk…ô-ńßu r~…ĺu baŇčgu" r~…ĺiwan nu ukak atu sumamad atu ajdaaj nu tu ¶u kinkiw…ôn tu dna par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sakamusa maŇčk…ô-z…ôn atu aw ¶uo-tu ¶u ini Ē~ ° ku kanki nu sir~…ĺ…ôt nuńß…ôni, itini i k…ôs…ôa- ¶…ô ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇča. ** dna*******. idaw ku mi ¶ir~…ĺiaj sakamusa nai Ē~ ° ku misa ¶a ¶aja amikinkiwan tu tat…ôŇčaaj, nuni kasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian ńßakija tunika patajan anika sumadan tu dna nikar~…ĺar~…ĺit nu nika r~…ĺawp…ôsan. dna . ami ¶a, kunika ¶ir~…ĺawan kuni kasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian, sakamusa ku maŇčk…ô-z…ôn, nu i tawjaaj a tad…ômaw nu ajawan satabar~…ĺaj tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu taas, ajdaaj nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw u ir~…ĺu nu maŇčk…ô-z…ôn. nina mikuwanaj tu tuu Ē~ °d nu maŇčk…ô a jun ¶umin, misausi a ¶aaj tu pi…ôdis tu katuudaj nunipikinkiwan, sisa ajawńßatu, a ¶aaj tu pisat…ôk…ôd mikinkiw tu ¶iin nuńß…ôni sa. **, . ńßini saan, aw ¶uo tu ¶u u kina ¶a ¶aj sa amabur~…ĺaw, makatukuńß tu aw ¶uo i …ônar~…ĺaj nu masanijadu Ē~ °aj a ir~…ĺu ¶an, nina kapur~…ĺuŇčan a ir~…ĺu ¶ tar~…ĺaajaw…ôn ku sausi namaka n…ômsip-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a maŇč nu mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu pi ¶r~…ĺim-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a maŇč nu mińß ¶aan, sajawaj nipir~…ĺijasan tu ńßui ¶uo nu ajdaaj a tad…ômaw nu k…ônińßan, nika idaw ku sibar~…ĺu ¶uaj saan tu pina nu mabur~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw. nikajdaan a nikabur~…ĺawan a dadan ńßan, nika k…ôr~…ĺańßan nu baju u bar~…ĺuŇča ku ka ¶aw…ôn nuńß…ôni "mir~…ĺ…ôbut tu subar~…ĺ", idaw ku na…ôm…ôkan, nina tu ¶u itini nu tanajuaj a dimadan, atu mar~…ĺawp…ôsajtu nu aw ¶uo tabakiaj a aadupan namapur~…ĺuŇč ku nuńß…ôni maudip. . namaka ¶iin, aw ¶uo jun ¶umin u m…ôr~…ĺani-sija atu papu-jaz…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺum Ē~ °aan, nika idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a ¶iinna, ńßakija namakajni i naju-z…ôn anikar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan, ńßakija nu ajdaaj nu o ¶u-z…ôn anikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan. . ni kinkiwan tu i kakitidaan tu imian aw ¶uo-z…ôn nu katuudaj a tapaŇč nu masa ¶a ¶aja ku taas a bina ¶adan. ir~…ĺu ¶ nu kitidaan anika k…ônińßan, saadidi Ē~ ° satu namaka ja ¶u …ônar~…ĺan nu mabur~…ĺawaj anikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan. . duma satu sin ¶i-ni…ôa a papu-ja-z…ôn, i nuajawan tu r~…ĺutu-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a maŇč nu mińß ¶aan, namaka ńßuir~…ĺi-pin a mama-nuja-z…ôn " mamanwa" nika r~…ĺijasan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, itini tu i nuajawan tu r~…ĺim-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan buwańß satu ku tad…ômaw. (mamanwa) . nipikinkiwan tu ¶iin itini i tus…ôp- ¶aj ¶aj a mińß ¶aan, aw ¶u tu ¶u, papu-ja-z…ôn atu mama-nuja-z…ôn idaw ku r~…ĺadaj tu ja ¶uo sumamadaj a tad…ômaw tu danni-suowa-z…ôn a ¶iinan, sisa ajdaaj nu ja ¶uo a tad…ômaw atu sumamadaj a tad…ômaw, itini i sipsip-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp nu ajawan a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu. ***** . tina tus…ôp- ¶ajtu a mińß ¶aan napatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nisur~…ĺidan, idaw ku nakamuan nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sip-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a mińß ¶aan, simakajdaaj i intu katukuńß i aw ¶uo tabakiaj nu ¶iin mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. tawja a zitajan, unikir~…ĺukan nu aw ¶uo tu sumamadaj, kasumadan nu gigi ¶u aru kakan…ôn a zitajan, sisa mi ¶uduńß tina tusaaj nu r~…ĺaadan a kanki. ***** . tu ¶u u adupu ku kawaw nu sakaudip nuńß…ôni, ami ¶a kunikaw tu ¶u a siakajan, sawni mabur~…ĺaw atu mibutin miadup ku wajwaj nuńß…ôni, tu ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu d…ômiadan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kakan…ôn, nika ka ¶aaja nu nijadu Ē~ °an anika udipan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nuńß…ôni ¶aaj tu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, itia i nijadu Ē~ °an, idaw ku mat…ôn…ôsaj nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tida atu mar~…ĺukaj a kawaw. aw ¶uo …ônar~…ĺan, sad…ô ¶d…ô ¶aj nu tad…ômaw ńßani itida i war~…ĺi timur~…ĺan a kitidaan, mi ¶id…ôk ku m…ôi-r~…ĺi-ńß…ô-ku. .
S.FORM: == likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ == katukuh i Awcuo siluma' ŚąįťĀĒśĺ≥śī≤šł¶ŚģöŚĪÖ nikulitan nipaadih ni Cenmuse. Kuke pacunaay tu balunga' a tademaw tu mikacaway tu balunga' a tademaw atu ci Kewia-gae niyadu'ay a tademaw itini i Sinna-wie-s a Kenay-e dadipasan " sayaway malalitemuh" hatidaay tu nu seice sakamusa tademaw itini i sip-sep-sep-sep-sep a mang katukuh tu lim-sep-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan tu nu ayawan makatukuh tu i Awcuo, batad nu mihcaan hakiya katukuh tu cay-tu-lim-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan. sipakayni i udip nipikinkiwan misausi hakiya makaala tu sip-sip-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mang nu mihcaan. 44,000ŚĻīŚČć. itini i Awcuo kaadihan nu satabalay ni pelaan nu aydaay a tademaw nu liwan a kidu u " Mangke-zen", nisausian tuni kaudipan han mabatad tu ayda nu siptu-sep-sep-sep mang nu mihcaan. 42,000ŚĻīŚČć. sayaway singangan tu " Mangke-hu lu banggu" liwan nu ukak atu sumamad atu aydaay nu Tucu kinkiwen tu DNA palecad sakamusa Mangke-zen atu Awcuo-tucu ini' ku kanki nu silet nuheni, itini i Kesea-ce caay palutatenga. 35 DNAÁÜĪŚäõÁ†īŚ£ěÁöĄŚĹĪťüŅ. idaw ku miciliay sakamusa nai' ku misacacaya amikinkiwan tu tatengaay, nuni kasilahecian hakiya tunika patayan anika sumadan tu DNA nikalalit nu nika lawpesan. DNA . amica, kunikacilawan kuni kasilahecian, sakamusa ku Mangke-zen, nu i tawyaay a tademaw nu ayawan satabalay tahekal nu taas, aydaay nu muenengay a tademaw u ilu nu Mangke-zen. nina mikuwanay tu tuu'd nu Mangke a yuncumin, misausi acaay tu piedis tu katuuday nunipikinkiwan, sisa ayawhatu, acaay tu pisateked mikinkiw tu Ciin nuheni sa. ťõĖÁĄ∂, . hini saan, Awcuo tucu u kinacacay sa amabulaw, makatukuh tu Awcuo i enalay nu masaniyadu'ay a ilucan, nina kapulungan a iluc talaayawen ku sausi namaka nemsip-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan katukuh tu piclim-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan, sayaway nipiliyasan tu Huicuo nu aydaay a tademaw nu kenihan, nika idaw ku sibalucuay saan tu pina nu mabulaway a tademaw. nikaydaan a nikabulawan a dadan han, nika kelahan nu bayu u balunga ku kacawen nuheni "milebut tu subal", idaw ku naemekan, nina tucu itini nu tanayuay a dimadan, atu malawpesaytu nu Awcuo tabakiay a aadupan namapulung ku nuheni maudip. . namaka ciin, Awcuo yuncumin u Melani-siya atu Papu-yazen a lalum'aan, nika idaw ku cacaya a ciinna, hakiya namakayni i Nayu-zen anikalalamelan, hakiya nu aydaay nu Ocu-zen anikalalidan. . ni kinkiwan tu i kakitidaan tu imian Awcuo-zen nu katuuday a tapang nu masacacaya ku taas a binacadan. iluc nu kitidaan anika kenihan, saadidi' satu namaka Yacu enalan nu mabulaway anikalalidan. . duma satu Sinci-nieya a Papu-ya-zen, i nuayawan tu lutu-sep-sep-sep a mang nu mihcaan, namaka Huili-pin a Mama-nuya-zen " Mamanwa" nika liyasan a tahekal, itini tu i nuayawan tu lim-sep-sep-sep malebut a mihcaan buwah satu ku tademaw. (Mamanwa) . nipikinkiwan tu ciin itini i tusep-caycay a mihcaan, Awcu tucu, Papu-ya-zen atu Mama-nuya-zen idaw ku laday tu Yacuo sumamaday a tademaw tu Danni-suowa-zen a ciinan, sisa aydaay nu Yacuo a tademaw atu sumamaday a tademaw, itini i sipsip-sep-sep-sep nu ayawan a mihcaan malamel tu. śďö2011 . tina tusep-caytu a mihcaan napatahekal tu nisulidan, idaw ku nakamuan nipatahekal tu sip-sep-sep-sep a mihcaan, simakaydaay i Intu katukuh i Awcuo tabakiay nu ciin muculil. tawya a zitayan, unikilukan nu Awcuo tu sumamaday, kasumadan nu gigicu aru kakanen a zitayan, sisa micuduh tina tusaay nu laadan a kanki. ŤÄĆ2012 . Tucu u adupu ku kawaw nu sakaudip nuheni, amica kunikaw Tucu a siakayan, sawni mabulaw atu mibutin miadup ku wayway nuheni, tu caaya kalecad nu demiadan caay kalecad ku kakanen, nika kacaaya nu niyadu'an anika udipan atu lalangawan nuheni caay tu pilecad, itia i niyadu'an, idaw ku matenesay nu muenengay i tida atu malukay a kawaw. Awcuo enalan, sadecdecay nu tademaw hani itida i wali timulan a kitidaan, micidek ku Mei-li-he-ku. .

¶i k…ôwia-ga…ô nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw itini i sinna-wi…ô-s a k…ônaj-…ô dadipasan " sajawaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß" ńßatidaaj tu nu s…ôi ¶…ô sakamusa tad…ômaw itini i sip-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a maŇč ¶iinna, ńßakija namakajni i naju-z…ôn anikar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan, ńßakija nu ajdaaj nu o ¶u-z…ôn anikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan. . ni kinkiwan tu i kakitidaan tu imian aw ¶uo-z…ôn nu katuudaj a tapaŇč nu masa ¶a ¶aja ku taas a bina ¶adan. ir~…ĺu ¶ nu kitidaan anika k…ônińßan, saadidi Ē~ ° satu namaka ja ¶u …ônar~…ĺan nu mabur~…ĺawaj anikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan. . duma satu sin ¶i-ni…ôa a papu-ja-z…ôn, i nuajawan tu r~…ĺutu-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a maŇč nu mińß ¶aan, namaka ńßuir~…ĺi-pin a mama-nuja-z…ôn " mamanwa" nika r~…ĺijasan a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, itini tu i nuajawan tu r~…ĺim-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan buwańß satu ku tad…ômaw. (mamanwa) . nipikinkiwan tu ¶iin itini i tus…ôp- ¶aj ¶aj a mińß ¶aan, aw ¶u tu ¶u, papu-ja-z…ôn atu mama-nuja-z…ôn idaw ku r~…ĺadaj tu ja ¶uo sumamadaj a tad…ômaw tu danni-suowa-z…ôn a ¶iinan, sisa ajdaaj nu ja ¶uo a tad…ômaw atu sumamadaj a tad…ômaw, itini i sipsip-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp nu ajawan a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu. ***** . tina tus…ôp- ¶ajtu a mińß ¶aan napatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nisur~…ĺidan, idaw ku nakamuan nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sip-s…ôp-s…ôp-s…ôp a mińß ¶aan, simakajdaaj i intu katukuńß i aw ¶uo tabakiaj nu ¶iin mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. tawja a zitajan, unikir~…ĺukan nu aw ¶uo tu sumamadaj, kasumadan nu gigi ¶u aru kakan…ôn a zitajan, sisa mi ¶uduńß tina tusaaj nu r~…ĺaadan a kanki. ***** . tu ¶u u adupu ku kawaw nu sakaudip nuńß…ôni, ami ¶a kunikaw tu ¶u a siakajan, sawni mabur~…ĺaw atu mibutin miadup ku wajwaj nuńß…ôni, tu ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu d…ômiadan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kakan…ôn, nika ka ¶aaja nu nijadu Ē~ °an anika udipan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nuńß…ôni ¶aaj tu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, itia i nijadu Ē~ °an, idaw ku mat…ôn…ôsaj nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tida atu mar~…ĺukaj a kawaw. aw ¶uo …ônar~…ĺan, sad…ô ¶d…ô ¶aj nu tad…ômaw ńßani itida i war~…ĺi timur~…ĺan a kitidaan, mi ¶id…ôk ku m…ôi-r~…ĺi-ńß…ô-ku. .
